The '''''Amanda Fallow''''' was one of the many [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that worked for and participated in [[Talon Karrde]]'s vast and varied [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations. The ship was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YZ-775 medium transport]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
As with the ''[[Uwana Buyer]]'', the ship's designation is quite possibly a play on the phrase "a man to follow."

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[The Last Command (abridged audiobook)|''The Last Command'' abridged audiobook]]
